steps.title: Pick two clean points from the graph
steps.content: Read two lattice points off the line and use them to find the slope $m=\frac{\Delta y}{\Delta x}=\frac{5}{7}$ (rise $5$ for run $7$).

steps.title: Convert to standard form
steps.content: Using point–slope $y-y_1=\frac{5}{7}(x-x_1)$ with the y-intercept and clearing fractions gives $35x-49y=-126$. That matches Choice B — $35x-49y=-126$.
